acquisition method: we performed validation using parallel reaction monitoring (PRM) analysis
alkylation reagent: the sample was then alkylated with 20 mM 2-chloroacetamide
alkylation concentration: the sample was then alkylated with 20 mM 2-chloroacetamide
cleavage agent: the antibody was first digested with trypsin for 16 h
collision energy: isolation window was set to 1.2 Th with a 34% HCD normalized collision energy (NCE)
fragmentation method: MS/MS scans were acquired in HCD mode
instrument: an Easy nLC1000 coupled to an Orbitrap Fusion Tribrid mass spectrometer
ionization type: connected to a Nanoflex electrospray source
labeling: peptides were analyzed by liquid chromatography–mass spectrometry/MS (LC-MS/MS)
